zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wakeman於1465年出生在英國瓦維其可爾德雷頓時，他的父親William Wakeman30歲，母親Nn Godspayne26歲。他於1486年與Eleanor Clarke在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Wakeman于1465年出生在英国瓦維其可爾德雷頓时，他的父亲William Wakeman30岁，母亲Nn Godspayne26岁。他于1486年与Eleanor Clarke在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1549年在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wakeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wakeman ‘watchman, town guard’, also ‘municipal officer responsible for night-time security and the town musicians’. Wakeman was the title of the chief magistrate of the borough of Ripon until 1604, when it was changed to mayor. He was the head of the body of wakemen whose duty was to blow a cow's horn every night at nine o'clock. If between then and sunrise any burglary took place, it was made good at the public charge. See also Watchman .

variants.name: Watchman
meanings: Native American (Navajo): from English watchman, probably used as a translation of a Navajo term for this occupation, ha'asídí.
English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English waccheman ‘watchman, guard, sentry’, also used as a nickname for a person characterised by wakefulness. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Watchorn
meanings: English (East Midlands, especially Leicestershire): nickname apparently from Middle English wache ‘vigil, wake, watch’ (Old English wacce) + horn ‘horn’. Compare the discussion of Wakeman .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wakeman was born in 1465, in Drayton, Warwickshire, England, his father, William Wakeman, was 30 and his mother, Nn Godspayne, was 26. He married Eleanor Clarke in 1486, in Drayton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1549, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Wakeman est né en 1465, à Drayton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William Wakeman, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Nn Godspayne, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Clarke en 1486, à Drayton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1549, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Wakeman 1465 in Drayton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Wakeman 30 und seine Mutter Nn Godspayne 26. Er hat 1486 in Drayton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Clarke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1549 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Wakeman è nato il nel 1465 nel Drayton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, William Wakeman, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Nn Godspayne, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Clarke nel 1486, nel Drayton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1549, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Wakemanが1465年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアドレイトンで生まれた時，父William Wakemanは30歳，母Nn Godspayneは26歳であった。1486年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアドレイトンでEleanor Clarkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1549年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Wakeman(이)가 1465년 영국 워윅실르 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wakeman(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Nn Godspayne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 드라이턴에서 Eleanor Clarke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Eleanor Clarke em 1486, em Drayton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wakeman родился в 1465 г. в местности дреитон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Wakeman было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Nn Godspayne, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Clarke в 1486 г. в местности дреитон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1549 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Wakeman nació en 1465, en Drayton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Wakeman, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Nn Godspayne, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Eleanor Clarke en 1486, en Drayton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1549, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
